sanskrit_devanagari: तस्मात्त्वमुत्तिष्ठ यशो लभस्व जित्वा शत्रून् भुङ्क्ष्व राज्यं समृद्धम्। मयैवैते निहताः पूर्वमेव निमित्तमात्रं भव सव्यसाचिन्॥
sanskrit_iast: tasmāt tvam uttiṣṭha yaśo labhasva jitvā śatrūn bhuṅkṣva rājyaṃ samṛddham, mayaivaite nihatāḥ pūrvam eva nimitta-mātraṃ bhava savyasācin
english_meaning: Therefore arise and win glory. These warriors are already struck down by Me; be only the instrument.

sanskrit_devanagari: सर्वधर्मान्परित्यज्य मामेकं शरणं व्रज। अहं त्वां सर्वपापेभ्यो मोक्षयिष्यामि मा शुचः॥
sanskrit_iast: sarva-dharmān parityajya mām ekaṃ śaraṇaṃ vraja, ahaṃ tvāṃ sarva-pāpebhyo mokṣayiṣyāmi mā śucaḥ
english_meaning: Abandon all limited notions of duty and take refuge in Me alone. I will free you from all sorrow and sin; do not grieve.

sanskrit_devanagari: क्लैब्यं मा स्म गमः पार्थ नैतत्त्वय्युपपद्यते। क्षुद्रं हृदयदौर्बल्यं त्यक्त्वोत्तिष्ठ परन्तप॥
sanskrit_iast: klaibyaṃ mā sma gamaḥ pārtha naitat tvayy upapadyate, kṣudraṃ hṛdaya-daurbalyaṃ tyaktvottiṣṭha parantapa
english_meaning: Yield not to weakness, O Partha. It does not suit you. Cast off petty faint-heartedness and arise.

sanskrit_devanagari: कर्मण्येवाधिकारस्ते मा फलेषु कदाचन। मा कर्मफलहेतुर्भूर्मा ते सङ्गोऽस्त्वकर्मणि॥
sanskrit_iast: karmaṇy-evādhikāras te mā phaleṣu kadācana, mā karma-phala-hetur bhūr mā te saṅgo 'stv akarmaṇi
english_meaning: You have control over your action alone, never over its fruits. Do not act for results alone, and do not fall into inaction.

sanskrit_devanagari: बुद्धियुक्तो जहातीह उभे सुकृतदुष्कृते। तस्माद्योगाय युज्यस्व योगः कर्मसु कौशलम्॥
sanskrit_iast: buddhi-yukto jahātīha ubhe sukṛta-duṣkṛte, tasmād yogāya yujyasva yogaḥ karmasu kauśalam
english_meaning: One established in wisdom drops both good and bad bondage here. Therefore engage in yoga; yoga is skill in action.

sanskrit_devanagari: परित्राणाय साधूनां विनाशाय च दुष्कृताम्। धर्मसंस्थापनार्थाय सम्भवामि युगे युगे॥
sanskrit_iast: paritrāṇāya sādhūnāṃ vināśāya ca duṣkṛtām, dharma-saṃsthāpanārthāya sambhavāmi yuge yuge
english_meaning: For protection of the good, destruction of evil, and establishment of dharma, I manifest age after age.

sanskrit_devanagari: उद्धरेदात्मनाऽत्मानं नात्मानमवसादयेत्। आत्मैव ह्यात्मनो बन्धुरात्मैव रिपुरात्मनः॥
sanskrit_iast: uddhared ātmanātmānaṃ nātmānam avasādayet, ātmaiva hyātmano bandhur ātmaiva ripur ātmanaḥ
english_meaning: Lift yourself by yourself; do not degrade yourself. The self is your friend, and the self is your enemy.

sanskrit_devanagari: राम दुआरे तुम रखवारे। होत न आज्ञा बिनु पैसारे॥
sanskrit_iast: rāma duāre tuma rakhavāre, hota na ājñā binu paisāre
english_meaning: You guard Rama's gate; none may pass without your grace.

sanskrit_devanagari: श्रीगुरु चरन सरोज रज निज मनु मुकुरु सुधारि। बरनउँ रघुबर बिमल जसु जो दायकु फल चारि॥
sanskrit_iast: śrī-guru caraṇa saroja raja nija manu mukuru sudhāri, baranauṃ raghubara bimala jasu jo dāyaku phala cāri
english_meaning: With the dust of the Guru's lotus feet I cleanse the mirror of my mind and sing the pure glory of Rama.
Where there is dharma, there is victory.
